title: arenaria ciliata f. multicaulis
intro: Arenaria ciliata f. multicaulis, also known as creeping sandwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Traditionally, creeping sandwort is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although its use and effectiveness may vary depending on the region and individual needs.
